archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) with Cinematic Editorial twist

core_principles: Cinematic Lighting: Use deep voids and subtle ice-blue neon glows (like spotlights on ice) rather than flat gradients.
Editorial Grid Layouts: High whitespace, generous margins, asymmetric 'Tetris' bento layouts to showcase products like art pieces.
Optical Clarity: Glassmorphism should feel like milled crystal, heavily blurred but visually sharp on the edges.
Invisible Yet Extraordinary: Use minimalist line-based iconography and stark geometric typography.
forbidden_patterns: No Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serif for headings (use Outfit).
Avoid pure black backgrounds (#000000); strictly use the requested navy/black #0E1726.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter uppercase
hierarchy.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-primary

layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-[#0E1726] hover:bg-primary_hover font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border border-border text-foreground hover:bg-surface hover:border-primary px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all duration-300

cards.default: bg-surface border border-border p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-500
cards.glass: bg-surface_glass backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 p-8 shadow-2xl

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0E1726]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border transition-all duration-300

motion.page_load: fade-in with subtle upward translation (duration-1000 ease-out)
motion.scroll_reveal: staggered fade-up for bento grid children (framer-motion whileInView)
motion.hover_effects: slow, cinematic scale-up (scale-105 duration-700) for images

hero.usage: Main hero background, use bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text contrast

products.name: Ice Spear
products.alt: Tall clear ice spear for highball glasses

environments.usage: Background for Testimonials or Process section

environments.alt: Assortment of luxury liquor on dark counter

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette requested: Deep Navy/Black (#0E1726) for background, White (#FFFFFF) for text, and Ice Blue (#8BD7FF, #3A8DFF) for glowing highlights.
Do NOT use pure black backgrounds or generic gray cards. Utilize the provided 'surface' hex codes and border colors.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' for titles and 'Montserrat' for body.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' strategy for the Product Showcase section. Ditch perfectly symmetric grids for asymmetric overlaps.
Implement high whitespace. Use py-24 or py-32 for section padding.
CRITICAL: Include `data-testid` on all interactive elements (e.g., `data-testid="contact-submit-button"`, `data-testid="nav-link-products"`).
Hero Section Overlay: Do NOT blank out the hero image completely. Use `bg-[#0E1726]/40` overlay or a gradient to keep the invisible ice image visible while text remains readable.
Use framer-motion or similar for subtle scroll reveals. The site must feel cinematic and expensive.
Implement a dedicated Process/Craftsmanship section and a Testimonials section as requested in user choices.
For components, stick strictly to HTML + Tailwind instead of heavily reliant Shadcn cards for the main marketing pages. Standard forms for Contact are fine.
Load Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Montserrat' in the index.html or global layout.
